title: Telemonial
description: Ever wanted to put two item together to get a new item? well now you can.
body:
## THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 80 DOWNLOADS


## About Telemonial

Telemonial lets you have all the creativity, chaos, and legendary weapon-making, you could dream of, in a new way thats super fun. This mod is designed for players who want unique weapons and tools, strange item combos, and vanilla-like but OP foods. 

## Features: 
- Crazy and broken OP items
- A new music disc
- cool new progression to beat the mod
- cookie.                (yay)

## Mod Guide:

**Telemonial** is a combine-anything type mod. Using a new editing station, players can craft weapons, tools, and stupidly OP items that don't fit in with vanilla Minecraft. Whether you want gunpowder bombs, elemental powers, or simply want to make your friends teleport 50 blocks above you… Telemonial is the best place to get it

## The Editing Table:
### 
To begin the progression of the mod, you need to craft the Editing Table

### 1. Obtain Telemonial Ore

Found in your world and mineable with an iron pickaxe or better.
This ore drops a **telemonial dust** that will help you create a new brick type that helps you make the editing table.

### 2. Craft Telemonial Bricks

Combine two bricks, two Telemonial and one stone type (diorite, for example) in a crafting table to make them turn into Telemonial Bricks.

### 3. Craft the Editing Table

Recipe:

5× Telemonial Bricks

1× Smithing Table

2× Iron Ingots

1× Telemonial Dust

Place them in the crafting table to forge the Editing Table, designed for combining two items into something new.

## Recommended Creations

Telemonial includes many combinations, but these signature combinations show what the mod is capable of:

### Lightning Sword

Recipe: Any Sword from vanilla + Lighting Rod

Hit an entity: After 5 seconds, lightning will strike their location.

Right-click: Creates a trail of lightning in front of you, burning anything crazy enough to stand in your path.

### Pain Cookie

If you guessed this ones fun you win a cookie.

Recipe: Cookie + Items That give pain like swords

When eaten or used… it spams screaming goat sounds at full intensity.

It does nothing helpful.

It is funny.



Why did I make this a thing??
